title: quant_profile
description: Deterministic quantitative style fingerprint emitted by scripts/profile_corpus.py from one or more sample documents. Language-parametrized (ko/en). Distributions, not verdicts — the emitter turns these into the target skill's metric bands.

thin.description: true when corpus is below the reliable-sample threshold; downstream confidence must degrade.

metrics.description: Seven axis-group measurements. Each value is a scalar or a small stats object {mean,median,p90,max,stdev}. Language-specific keys may be null when N/A for the language.

sentence.description: Sentence architecture: length distribution, long-sentence ratio, clause-chaining density, rhythm (length variance).

clause_chain_density.description: subordinate-connective joins per sentence (ko: 연결어미; en: subordinators + comma-clauses).

ending.description: Ending register & modality. ko: 종결어미 분포·평서 ―다체 비율·가능/전망 화법·구어체 검출. en: declarative/interrogative mix, active/passive, contraction rate.

hedge_projection_ratio.description: share of endings using possibility/projection modality (ko: ~수 있다/~로 보인다; en: may/could/appears).

spoken_count.description: colloquial/honorific endings detected (ko: 요/죠/습니다; en: contractions in formal prose).

lexical.description: Lexical register: Sino-Korean/Latinate density, jargon-gloss frequency, vocabulary richness, intensifier budget.

register_density.description: ko: 한자어 밀도; en: Latinate/formal-word ratio.

gloss_count.description: inline glosses like 한글(English, 약어) / term (gloss).

cohesion.description: Cohesion & argument flow: connective density and the transition/juxtaposition/convergence balance.

convergence_markers.description: ko: 결국/궁극적으로; en: ultimately/in the end.

stance.description: Stance & voice: passive/nominalization rate, self-reference form, evaluation/emphasis density.

self_reference_count.description: formal self-reference (ko: 본 연구/본 글; en: this work/this study).

first_person_count.description: exposed first person (ko: 나/저/우리; en: I/we).

evaluation_density.description: significance-marking phrases per 1k chars (ko: ~의 핵심이다; en: is central to).

formatting.description: Formatting habits: paragraph length, list/heading usage, emoji, punctuation signature, citation style, structural error signals.

citation_style.description: detected inline-citation convention (e.g. wikilink [[N. title]], bracket [N], footnote, none).
